name: Crostini Ai Pepperoni Arrostiti (Crostini Wit
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the bell peppers until charred, then remove the seeds.
2. Warm olive oil in a large sauté pan over low heat.
3. Add sliced peppers and minced garlic to the pan.
4. Cook for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the peppers are softened.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Stir in chopped parsley and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
7. Spoon the mixture onto grilled crostini or puree it and spoon over the crostini.
